title: SpudSmp
description: Spud SMP is a custom Minecraft modpack designed for a friend group looking to enhance their gameplay with quality-of-life improvements and creative possibilities. Featuring the popular Create mod and some of its exciting addons.
body:
**Spud SMP:** _A Quality of Life Modpack for Friends_

**Spud SMP** is a custom Minecraft modpack designed for a friend group looking to enhance their gameplay with quality-of-life improvements and creative possibilities. Featuring the popular Create mod and its exciting addons, this pack allows players to automate, build, and explore in new, innovative ways. With a focus on convenience and fun, Spud SMP makes your Minecraft experience smoother and more enjoyable, all while keeping things relaxed and perfect for cooperative play. Whether you're crafting intricate machines or simply enjoying the little upgrades, this modpack is made to bring friends closer together in the world of Minecraft.
